story.text:
# 🛠️ Role Skills

The functional skills a persona carries — economics, governance, cryptography, ceremony, defense. Each page is a forkable skill; fork it to materialize a local `SKILL.md`.

## Pages

- [[Agentprivacy Academic]] — Formal academic specification and research methodology for 0xagentprivacy.
- [[Agentprivacy Agent Interop]] — Agent interoperability protocols for 0xagentprivacy multi-agent systems.
- [[Agentprivacy AI Agent]] — AI agent architecture and dual-agent separation for 0xagentprivacy.
- [[Agentprivacy Armor Progression]] — Armor progression system (Blade→Light→Heavy→Full Plate→Dragon) for 0xagentprivacy.
- [[Agentprivacy Blade Forge]] — Blade configuration mechanics for the spellweb forge.
- [[Agentprivacy Blade Naming]] — The Blade Naming Ceremony — post-forge ceremony that gives an algebraically-defined blade a mythological id…
- [[Agentprivacy Boundary Enforcement]] — Real-time access control decision engine for 0xagentprivacy swordsman agents.
- [[Agentprivacy Braid Reasoning]] — Bounded reasoning architecture for privacy-preserving AI agents using BRAID Mermaid graphs.
- [[Agentprivacy Ceremony Engine]] — Interaction protocols for the dual-territory architecture.
- [[Agentprivacy Consent Infrastructure]] — Consent infrastructure and IEEE 7012 MyTerms integration for 0xagentprivacy.
- [[Agentprivacy Constellation Method]] — Constellation identity method for 0xagentprivacy.
- [[Agentprivacy Cross Chain]] — Cross-chain operations for 0xagentprivacy multi-chain architecture.

- [[Agentprivacy Data Dignity]] — Data dignity and the 7th capital thesis for 0xagentprivacy.
- [[Agentprivacy Derivation Certificate]] — VRC as content-addressed derivation chain.

- [[Agentprivacy Environmental Commons]] — Environmental commons and polycentric governance for 0xagentprivacy.
- [[Agentprivacy Five Strikes]] — The five UOR operations as lattice transformations.
- [[Agentprivacy Forensic Defense]] — Incident response, breach containment, damage assessment, and evidence preservation for 0xagentprivacy swor…
- [[Agentprivacy Governance Agents]] — Agent governance participation protocols for 0xagentprivacy.
- [[Agentprivacy Grimoire Navigation]] — Spellbook interconnection and traversal methodology for 0xagentprivacy.
- [[Agentprivacy Guild Efficiency]] — Guild efficiency and shared-parent coordination for 0xagentprivacy V5.
- [[Agentprivacy Hemispheric Attention]] — Five attentions framework for 0xagentprivacy.
- [[Agentprivacy Hexagram Convergence]] — I Ching mapping for blade configurations in the spellweb forge.
- [[Agentprivacy Hitchhiker Governance]] — Decentralised governance (Hitchhiker's Guide pattern) for 0xagentprivacy guilds.
- [[Agentprivacy Holonic Identity]] — Identity-independent data structures where GUIDs outlive any single backend.
- [[Agentprivacy Holonic Persistence]] — Multi-provider data persistence for privacy-preserving agents.
- [[Agentprivacy Holonic Reasoning]] — Shared reasoning graphs and inference artefacts as persistent, provider-agnostic holons.
- [[Agentprivacy Inscription Mechanics]] — Operational mechanics of the three inscription paths (Shadow, Guarded, Open) for 0xagentprivacy trust commi…
- [[Agentprivacy Intel Pooling]] — Collective intelligence sharing through privacy-preserving aggregation for 0xagentprivacy agent economies.
- [[Agentprivacy Key Ceremony]] — Key generation, rotation, delegation, revocation, and hardware binding for the 0xagentprivacy dual-agent ar…
- [[Agentprivacy Mana Economy]] — Energy mechanics for the grimoire system.
- [[Agentprivacy Media Plurality]] — Media plurality and information commons for 0xagentprivacy.
- [[Agentprivacy Mesh Architecture]] — Mesh network architecture for 0xagentprivacy.
- [[Agentprivacy Metadata Resistance]] — Traffic analysis resistance, timing obfuscation, and metadata stripping for 0xagentprivacy swordsman operat…
- [[Agentprivacy Narrative Compression]] — Narrative compression methodology for 0xagentprivacy spellbook system.
- [[Agentprivacy Nullifier Design]] — Nullifier construction, deployment, and verification for 0xagentprivacy privacy-preserving invalidation.
- [[Agentprivacy Perimeter Hardening]] — Device security, OS hardening, network configuration, and physical security for 0xagentprivacy swordsman in…
- [[Agentprivacy Personhood Sybil]] — Personhood verification and Sybil resistance for 0xagentprivacy.
- [[Agentprivacy Plurality Cooperative]] — Plurality and cooperative technology (⿻) for 0xagentprivacy.
- [[Agentprivacy Policy Governance]] — Standards and policy governance for 0xagentprivacy.
- [[Agentprivacy Pretext Measurement]] — DOM-free text measurement technique for privacy-preserving browser interactions.
- [[Agentprivacy Proverbiogenesis]] — Proverb lifecycle and the 5-phase proverb evolution for 0xagentprivacy RPP.
- [[Agentprivacy Quantum Defence]] — Quantum threat model and defence architecture.
- ☀️🌍🌑👤 [[Agentprivacy Quaternion Mapping]] — Domain skill for four-body system analysis and mapping.
- [[Agentprivacy Recovery RPP]] — Recovery mechanisms and Relationship Proverb Protocol for 0xagentprivacy.
- [[Agentprivacy Reputation Credentials]] — Reputation and credential evolution (SBT→VRC) for 0xagentprivacy.
- [[Agentprivacy Revocation Mechanics]] — Consent withdrawal, key revocation, credential invalidation, and data deletion enforcement for 0xagentpriva…
- [[Agentprivacy Selective Disclosure]] — Selective disclosure and Privacy Pool mechanics for 0xagentprivacy.
- [[Agentprivacy Separation Enforcement]] — Active maintenance of the dual-agent separation boundary Φ(Σ) for 0xagentprivacy architecture.
- [[Agentprivacy Shared Parent Patterns]] — O(1) collective data structures that avoid N-squared coupling for guilds, pools, and agent swarms.
- [[Agentprivacy Sovereignty Economics]] — Sovereignty economics and P^1.5 superlinearity for 0xagentprivacy.
- [[Agentprivacy Spell Encoding]] — Emoji symbolic notation as formal language for 0xagentprivacy agent communication.
- [[Agentprivacy Spellweb]] — Spellweb navigation architecture for 0xagentprivacy V5.
- [[Agentprivacy Story Diffusion]] — Story fracture and principle convergence methodology for 0xagentprivacy idea propagation.
- [[Agentprivacy Stranger Ceremony]] — Understanding-as-Key ceremony for parties without prior relationship.
- [[Agentprivacy Swordsman Browser]] — Swordsman browser agent for 0xagentprivacy MyTerms integration.
- 💥🌑 [[Agentprivacy Theia Derivation]] — Domain skill for origin-as-impact patterns in agent derivation.
- [[Agentprivacy Threat Adversarial]] — Threat modelling and adversarial analysis for 0xagentprivacy.
- [[Agentprivacy Toroidal Witness]] — Infinite witness space from toroidal topology.
- [[Agentprivacy Trust Spanning]] — Trust spanning and cross-boundary operations for 0xagentprivacy.
- [[Agentprivacy Two Waters]] — Orphic hydrology of the sovereignty lattice — Lethe (the river of forgetting, named Blade 25) and Mnemosyne…
- [[Agentprivacy Understanding As Key]] — Understanding-as-authentication for 0xagentprivacy RPP.
